name: Automated Category Assignment for Ancient Pottery Data (GCP-Based ETL Pipeline)
stack: Python • Pandas • Google Cloud Storage • BigQuery • ETL Pipeline • Excel Processing • Regular Expressions • Keyword Matching • Data Transformation
summary: Designed and implemented a cloud-enabled ETL pipeline on Google Cloud Platform to automate category assignment for a large-scale Excel dataset (~100,000 records). The solution extracts data from Cloud Storage, applies text cleaning and normalization using pandas, and performs rule-based keyword matching with regex, combination logic, and exclusion rules to ensure accurate classification. The transformed data is then stored back in Cloud Storage and loaded into BigQuery for scalable querying and analytics, eliminating manual effort and improving consistency in category labeling.

name: Pottery-Operations-Analytics-by-Jira-v1
stack: Jira • Agile Methodology • Kanban • Excel • Data Modeling • ETL Concepts • Data Validation • Workflow Design • GitHub
summary: A Jira-based analytics workflow project designed to simulate real-world IT operations and data pipeline design. The project demonstrates Agile delivery using Epics, Tasks, Sprints, and Kanban boards, covering data source identification, schema design, data extraction planning, transformation, validation, and dashboard prototyping. It highlights structured thinking in organizing data workflows and delivering business-ready analytics solutions.

name: Pottery-Operations-Analytics-through-PowerBI-Excel-v2
stack: Power BI • Excel • Data Visualization • Data Transformation • Power Query • DAX • CSV • Jira Data • Dashboard Design • KPI Reporting
summary: An end-to-end analytics project focused on transforming Jira-style operational data into interactive dashboards using Excel and Power BI. The project involves extracting data in CSV format, performing data cleaning and transformation in Excel, and building dynamic visualizations to track SLA performance, ticket trends, resolution time, and team workload. It highlights strong capabilities in data analysis, dashboard design, and business storytelling, enabling non-technical stakeholders to understand and act on operational insights.

name: Data-Transfer-From-PostgreSQL-to-PowerBi-through-Fast-APIs
stack: PostgreSQL • FastAPI • REST API's • Docker • PowerBi • Power Query  • JWT Authentication • Hash Authentication • Bearer Tokens
summary: A secure analytics backend built with FastAPI and PostgreSQL to deliver production data to Power BI. It exposes JWT-secured REST APIs with time-based parameters and runs PostgreSQL in Docker. Power BI consumes data via Bearer tokens, enabling scalable access without direct database exposure.

name: Bookstore Database Management System
stack: Oracle SQL • ER Modeling • Triggers • Constraints • SQL Joins • Data Integrity
summary: Designed a relational Bookstore Database using Oracle SQL by applying ER modeling, foreign keys, triggers, and constraints. Built entities such as Books, Authors, Categories, Orders, Users, and Promotions, implemented SQL joins, automated audit logging, and enforced data integrity.

name: Vue Task Management (ToDo) App
stack: Vue.js • JavaScript • HTML5 • CSS3 • Component-Based Architecture • Reactive UI • GitHub Pages
summary: Developed a responsive task management application using Vue.js that allows users to add, complete, and delete tasks dynamically. Implemented component-based architecture and reactive data binding to provide real-time updates and an intuitive user interface.

name: AR Image Recognition App
stack: Unity 3D• Vuforia • ARCore • Android • C# • Firebase
summary: Allows users to scan a predefined image and automatically plays a linked video in augmented reality. Used in educational and event settings to deliver interactive explanations by scanning images.

name: Medical AI Chatbot (RAG)
stack: Python • NLP • LLM/RAG • LangChain • Pinecone • API integrations • Flask • Vector Database • GIT
summary: Built a chatbot concept for medical Q&A with retrieval-based responses and evaluation focus.

name: Injury Image Analysis & Segmentation Prototype
stack: Python • Gradio • OpenCV • NumPy • PyTorch • Hugging Face Transformers • PIL (Python Imaging Library)
summary: Built a local Gradio-based prototype that analyzes uploaded injury images by detecting the primary region using DETR panoptic segmentation, extracting bounding boxes with OpenCV, estimating size and area using pixel-to-centimeter conversion, and computing average RGB color values for basic visual analysis.

name: Desktop Support & Incident Management Project
stack: Ticketing Workflows • ServiceNow • Office 365 • Windows/macOS • Active Directory • ITSM
summary: Provided first-level desktop support by logging, triaging, and resolving incidents and service requests, documenting resolutions, tracking progress, supporting device setup, laptop refresh activities, and basic security and access control procedures.

name: ServiceNow ITSM Analytics & Automation Platform
stack: Client: NYC DOE USA • ServiceNow • ITSM • Reports • Performance Analytics • SLA Frameworks • Workflow Automation
summary: Designed and supported ServiceNow ITSM dashboards and automated KPI reporting for the New York City Department of Education, enabling real-time visibility into incidents, requests, SLA performance, and overall service health while reducing manual reporting effort.

name: ServiceNow CMDB Optimization & Asset Governance
stack: Client: Saxo Bank Denmark • ServiceNow • CMDB • CI Relationship Mapping • Asset Lifecycle • Data Audits • Automation Rules
summary: Supported CMDB data normalization, configuration item relationship mapping, and asset lifecycle governance within ServiceNow for Saxo Bank, improving configuration accuracy, audit readiness, and change impact analysis through validation and automation.

name: ServiceNow Virtual Agent & Knowledge Management Modernization
stack: Client: ZS Associates Pune • ServiceNow • Virtual Agent • Knowledge Base • ITSM • Self-Service Automation
summary: Implemented and enhanced ServiceNow Virtual Agent workflows and standardized knowledge base governance for ZS Associates, improving self-service adoption, reducing service desk workload, and enabling faster issue resolution for end users.
